tasks.name: Get an online quote and select the cheapest plan with $300,000 liability and $500 deductible
tasks.description: Start a new boat insurance quote for a 22-foot sailboat in ZIP 98109, set liability to $300,000 and deductible to $500, then choose the cheapest available plan and select annual payment.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Get a Quote" button in the main header.
On the quote form, select "Sailboat" from the Boat Type dropdown and enter "22" in the Boat Length field.
In the Boat Value field, enter "35000" and type "98109" in the ZIP Code field, then select "Pleasure / Personal use only" from the Usage options.
Click the "Continue" button to go to the coverage options step.
On the coverage options page, choose "$300,000" from the Liability Limit dropdown.
Select "$500" from the Deductible dropdown and click the "View Plans" button.
On the plans list page, open the sort dropdown and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click the "Select Plan" button on the first plan in the sorted results (the cheapest plan shown).
On the billing options screen, select the "Pay Annually" radio button.

tasks.name: Customize optional coverages while keeping added cost under $20 per month
tasks.description: Create a quote, then add towing and personal effects coverages so that towing is included and personal effects is at least $1,000, while ensuring the displayed additional monthly cost of optional coverages stays under $20.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Get a Quote" button.

On the initial quote form, select any boat type (for example, "Motorboat"), enter a length such as "20" feet, a boat value like "30000", ZIP code "98109", and choose "Pleasure / Personal use only", then click "Continue".
On the coverage options page, leave the default liability and deductible values as they are and click the "View Plans" or "See Plans" button.
On the plans page, click the "Select Plan" button for the middle-priced plan shown (for example, the second plan in the list).
On the plan summary screen, click the "Customize Optional Coverages" or "Add Options" link or button.
In the optional coverages section, turn on the toggle or check the box for "Towing & Assistance".
Turn on the toggle or check the box for "Personal Effects" coverage and initially select the "$2,000" limit from its dropdown or slider.

Look at the line item or section showing the additional monthly cost for optional coverages; if the total extra monthly cost exceeds "$20", reduce the Personal Effects limit to "$1,000" by selecting "$1,000" from the same control.
If the additional monthly cost for optional coverages is still above "$20" after lowering the Personal Effects limit, turn Personal Effects coverage off while keeping "Towing & Assistance" turned on.
Stop adjusting once the interface shows that towing is included and the total additional monthly cost for optional coverages is under "$20" per month.

tasks.name: Log in and update the mailing address for an existing boat policy
tasks.description: Use the customer portal to log in with provided demo credentials, open an existing boat policy, change the mailing address to a specific Seattle address, and then view the digital ID card for that policy.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Customer Login" or "Sign In" link in the header.
On the login page, type "demo_user" into the Username field and "DemoPass123!" into the Password field, then click the "Log In" button.
On the account dashboard, click on the policy card labeled "Boat Policy" with policy number "BP-10001" to open that policy.
Within the boat policy view, click the "Profile & Settings" or "Contact Details" tab in the policy navigation.
In the profile section, click the "Edit" button next to the Mailing Address section.
In the address form, type "123 Marina Way" in the Address Line 1 field, "Seattle" in the City field, select "WA" from the State dropdown, and enter "98109" in the ZIP Code field.
Click the "Save Address" or "Update Address" button to apply the new mailing address.
After the address is saved, click the "ID Cards" or "Documents" link in the policy navigation menu.
In the documents or ID cards list, locate the current boat policy and click the "View Digital ID Card" button or link for that policy.
Remain on the digital ID card view page without downloading or printing the card.

tasks.name: File an online claim for $3,200 hull damage with no injuries
tasks.description: Submit an online boat insurance claim for policy BP-10001 for hull damage from a collision with a dock at Lake Union on 08/15/2025, with an estimated damage amount of $3,200 and no injuries reported.
steps: From the homepage, click the "File a Claim" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the claim type selection page, choose the "Boat Insurance" claim option.
In the policy number field, type "BP-10001" and click the "Start Claim" or "Continue" button.
On the incident details form, use the date picker to set the incident date to "08/15/2025".
In the "Incident Location" field, type "Lake Union, Seattle, WA" and select "Collision with dock" from the Cause of Damage dropdown.
Enter "3200" in the Estimated Damage Amount field and select "No injuries" from the injuries question dropdown or radio buttons.
For the "Police Report Filed" question, select the "No" or "Not reported" option and then click the "Continue" button.
On the owner details page, fill in First Name as "Alex", Last Name as "Rivera", Phone Number as "2065550199", and Email as "alex.rivera@example.com".
In the incident description text area, type a brief three-sentence explanation describing how the boat hit the dock and the visible damage, then click the "Review Claim" button.
On the claim review page, scroll through the summary and click the "Submit Claim" button to complete filing the claim.

tasks.name: Find a local agent within 15 miles of ZIP 98109 and send a consultation request
tasks.description: Search for local agents near ZIP 98109, filter to a 15-mile radius, open the closest agent’s page, and submit a consultation request message about boat insurance for a 22-foot sailboat.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Find a Local Agent" or "Find an Agent" link in the header.
On the agent search page, type "98109" into the ZIP Code search field and click the "Search" button.
On the results page, open the distance filter dropdown and select the "Within 15 miles" option.
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Distance: Nearest First" to sort agents by proximity.
Click on the name of the first agent listed in the sorted results to open that agent’s detail page.
On the agent detail page, click the primary office phone number link labeled "Call Office" or similar.
Click the "Request a Consultation" or "Contact Agent" button on the same agent page.
In the consultation request form, type "Interested in boat insurance for a 22-foot sailboat in ZIP 98109" into the message or comments text area.
Fill in your name as "Jordan Lee" and your email address as "jordan.lee@example.com" in the appropriate form fields.
Click the "Send Message" or "Submit Request" button to send the consultation request to the agent.

tasks.name: Compare policy types and start a quote for the lowest-priced plan with towing and uninsured boater coverage and $500,000 liability
tasks.description: Use the coverage comparison tool to identify the lowest-priced policy type that includes both on-water towing and uninsured boater coverage, then start a quote for that policy type and set liability to at least $500,000.
steps: From the homepage, click or hover over "Boat Insurance" in the main navigation and select "Coverage Options" from the dropdown menu.
On the coverage overview page, click the "Compare Policy Types" button or link.
In the comparison table, locate the columns for "Liability Only", "Standard", and "Premium" policy types.
Use any available feature filter, checkboxes, or legend to highlight or focus on the features "On-water towing" and "Uninsured boater coverage" in the table.

Identify which policy types show checkmarks for both "On-water towing" and "Uninsured boater coverage", then click the "View Details" button under the lowest-priced policy type among those that qualify.
On the selected policy type’s detail page, find the liability coverage selector and choose a limit of at least "$500,000" (for example, select "$500,000" or higher from the dropdown).
Click the "Get a Quote for This Policy" button on the detail page.
On the quick quote form, enter "98109" in the ZIP Code field and "35000" in the Boat Value field, then click the "Continue" button.
On the resulting plans or coverage page, ensure the chosen policy type remains selected and click the "Continue to Applicant Info" or similar button.
Stop on the applicant information form page without entering any additional personal details.

tasks.name: Apply boating safety and multi-policy discounts to a quote and save it with a label
tasks.description: Locate the discounts section, identify the Boating Safety Course and Multi-Policy discounts, start a quote from that page, apply both discounts to the quote, select monthly payments, and save the quote with a specific label.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Discounts" link in the main navigation bar.
On the discounts overview page, scroll until you see sections for "Boating Safety Course" and "Multi-Policy" discounts.
Click the "Learn More" link or button under the "Boating Safety Course" discount and read the eligibility description shown on that detail view.
Use the navigation or breadcrumbs to return to the main Discounts page, then click the "Apply Discounts to a Quote" or "Start a Quote with Discounts" button.
On the quote form that appears, enter ZIP code "98109" and boat value "25000" in the respective fields, then click the "Start Quote" or "Continue" button.

On the discounts or eligibility step of the quote process, check the box for "Completed approved boating safety course" and also check the box for "I also have homeowners insurance with this company" to indicate eligibility for both discounts.
Click the "Update Price", "Recalculate", or similar button to apply the selected discounts to the quote.
When the updated quote summary appears, select the radio button or dropdown option for "Monthly payments" as the billing frequency.
Click the "Save This Quote" button, and in the label or quote name field that appears, type "Safety + Multi-Policy Discounts" as the quote label.
Click the final "Save" or "Confirm" button to store the quote and remain on the page showing the saved quote confirmation and reference number.

tasks.name: Use the FAQ to find the maximum boat length allowed for online quotes and start a qualifying quote
tasks.description: Search the Help/FAQ section to discover the maximum boat length that can be quoted online, then start a new quote and enter a boat length exactly 1 foot less than that maximum value before proceeding to coverage options.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Help & FAQs" or "Support" link in the main navigation or footer.
In the help center search bar, type "maximum boat length" and press Enter or click the search icon.
In the search results list, click the first article titled "Boat eligibility for online quotes" or a similarly named article about boat eligibility.
Within that article, locate the section that specifies the maximum boat length eligible for online quotes and mentally note the maximum number of feet mentioned (for example, "30" feet).
Click the site logo or the "Home" link to return to the website homepage.
On the homepage, click the "Get a Quote" button.
On the quote form, in the Boat Length field, enter a number that is exactly 1 foot less than the maximum length you found in the article (for example, if the maximum is 30 feet, type "29").
On the same form, select "Motorboat" as the Boat Type, enter "25000" in the Boat Value field, type "98109" in the ZIP Code field, and choose "Pleasure / Personal use only" from the usage options.
Click the "Continue" button to move from the boat details step to the next step in the quote process.
Stop on the coverage options or next quote step page that appears after the boat details are accepted.

entities.name: PolicyType

fields.name: relativePriceRank
fields.description: 1 = lowest priced, higher number = more expensive

entities.name: InsurancePlan

fields.name: includedOptionalCoverageIds
fields.description: Array of OptionalCoverage ids automatically included in the plan

entities.name: OptionalCoverage

fields.name: optionalCoveragesTotalMonthly

fields.name: label

fields.name: referenceNumber

entities.name: QuoteOptionalCoverage

fields.name: selectedLimit

fields.name: additionalCostMonthly
fields.description: Extra monthly cost for this optional coverage at the selected limit

entities.name: Policy
entities.description: Existing boat insurance policy shown in the account dashboard and policy detail pages

entities.name: PolicyDocument
entities.description: Documents associated with a policy, including digital ID cards

fields.name: viewUrl
fields.description: Internal URL or identifier for rendering the document/ID card

entities.name: Discount
entities.description: Available discounts such as Boating Safety Course and Multi-Policy

fields.name: maxSavingsPercent
fields.description: Approximate maximum savings percentage for this discount

fields.name: detailArticleSlug
fields.description: Slug of a HelpArticle with more detail about this discount

entities.name: Claim
entities.description: Boat insurance claim filed through the online claim form

entities.name: Agent
entities.description: Local insurance agents available in search results

fields.name: serviceRadiusMiles
fields.description: Typical radius around the office where the agent serves clients

entities.name: AgentConsultationRequest
entities.description: Messages submitted to agents via the consultation request form

entities.name: HelpArticle

fields.name: maxOnlineQuoteBoatLengthFeet
